_comment: Dev profile 'Dev: Live (no login)' (DOTNET_ENVIRONMENT=DevLive). Skips login and auto-connects a real broker using credentials already saved by the login screen. Defaults to Interactive Brokers (TWS/Gateway must be running and signed in). Edit AutoConnectBrokers to target Alpaca/cTrader instead. If no credentials are saved for the chosen broker, the connect fails and is logged to the Activity Log (not fatal).
